text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while Fuji Kiseki is walking down the
hallway...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ow... Why do my muscles hurt? But if the muscles
in this area are hurting, it must mean...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I have a bad feeling about this. I'd better tell
Trainer right awa—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No, that'll just cause unnecessary worry. I should
go to the infirmary and get checked out first...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you have a minute? You see, I felt
some pain running down my leg today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I went to the infirmary to see what was wrong,
and...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Judging from your expression, my little
prank worked.
choice_data_list: Your prank wasn't good for my heart...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, sorry. I don't blame you for being worried. I
was scared at first too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm usually never sore because I used to dance so
much, and I've never felt pain in this particular
area.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But if they're sore now, it must mean that I'm
training and strengthening muscles I wasn't able
to before in dance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And it's all thanks to a certain someone's very
effective training regime. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yep. This has been a learning experience for me
too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
New doors have opened, and I can fly even more
magnificently down the turf than before... I'm
counting on you to keep up the good work,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Fuji Kiseki's learned she still has a
long ways to go in terms of training.
